items.title: Nvidia market share in China falls to less than 60% — Chinese chip makers deliver 1.65 million AI GPUs as the government pushes data centers to use domestic chips
items.description: Local chip makers take 41% of the Chinese AI semiconductor market, while Nvidia's market share falls to 55% — down from the company's claimed high of 95%.
items.content: Copy link Facebook X Whatsapp Reddit Pinterest Flipboard Email Share this article 2 Join the conversation Follow us Add us as a preferred source on Google Newsletter Tom's Hardware Stay On the Cutting Edge: Get the Tom's Hardware Newsletter Get Tom's Hardware's best news and in-depth reviews, straight to your inbox. You are now subscribed Your newsletter sign-up was successful An account already exists for this email address, please log in. Subscribe to our newsletter Chinese semiconductor firms have taken a big chunk of the domestic market, claiming 41% of the local AI server market and delivering 1.65 million AI GPUs out of a total of 4 million units in 2025. IDC numbers reported by Reuters claim that Nvidia still leads with a 55% market share, shipping an estimated 2.2 million cards, but this is a major contraction compared to the company’s claimed 95% market share before sanctions.Huawei is reported to be the big winner among the Chinese chipmakers, shipping around 812,000 AI chips or nearly 20% of the market. The Shenzhen-based firm is continuing development of AI processors, with the company launching its Atlas 350 AI accelerator last week, which is claimed to have nearly three times the performance of Nvidia H20 chips. T-Head, which is owned by Alibaba, the e-commerce platform widely known as China’s Amazon, holds a distant third place with 256,000 units sold.AMD sits just outside of the top three chipmakers in China, shipping 160,000 units for a 4% share of the domestic AI chip market. Baidu’s Kunlunxin AI chip subsidiary and Chinese AI chip maker Cambricon round out the top five, with each company delivering 116,000 cards.Article continues below You may like Nvidia China market share to drastically decrease from 66% to 8%, analysts claim China’s GPU cloud consolidates around Baidu and Huawei as domestic AI chips scale up Chinese companies reportedly considering sourcing H200 chips from the black market as chips held at the border Even though the U.S. banned Nvidia and AMD from selling their most advanced chips to China in 2023, many Chinese tech firms still favored nerfed versions of their latest AI GPUs, like the Nvidia H20 and AMD MI308. However, U.S. President Donald Trump completely banned all AI GPU exports in April 2025, forcing Chinese companies to rely on domestic chip makers.Trump reversed the ban on the H20 and MI308 in July 2025, but Chinese companies were told to stop ordering Nvidia’s chips after U.S. Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick’s “addition” comments during an interview. In December 2025, Trump made a complete U-turn and finally allowed Nvidia to ship the H200 to China, but it took several months before Chinese companies were allowed to order the U.S.-only chips, and only for specific institutions and applications.Beijing is facing a dilemma as it wants to support its domestic chip industry but also wants its AI tech companies to remain competitive on the global stage. While Chinese chip makers have advanced by leaps and bounds in recent years, it still lags five to ten years in AI data center chips compared to Nvidia and AMD. Despite that, the Chinese government’s efforts seem to be paying off, as seen by the increasing market share of local chip makers.We have yet to see if Washington’s move to allow Nvidia to sell its H200 chips to China will see the company regain its lost market share in 2026. But even if Chinese companies are eager to purchase these AI GPUs en masse, Beijing’s effort to redirect some of the demand towards domestic semiconductors will likely mean that Nvidia would have a hard time returning to pre-sanctions market share.Stay On the Cutting Edge: Get the Tom's Hardware NewsletterGet Tom's Hardware's best news and in-depth reviews, straight to your inbox.Contact me with news and offers from other Future brandsReceive email from us on behalf of our trusted partners or sponsors Follow Tom's Hardware on Google News, or add us as a preferred source, to get our latest news, analysis, & reviews in your feeds.
items.author: Jowi Morales
items.titleZh: 英伟达在华市场份额跌破60%——国产AI GPU交付165万颗，政府力推数据中心采用国产芯片
items.descriptionZh:
根据国际数据公司（IDC）通过路透社披露的报告，中国本土半导体企业在国内人工智能（AI）服务器芯片市场取得了显著进展。2025年，中国市场共出货约400万张AI GPU（图形处理器），其中中国公司出货量达到165万张，占据了41%的国内市场份額。这一变化标志着市场格局的重大重塑。

尽管英伟达（Nvidia）仍以55%的市场份额（约220万张出货量）保持领先，但其地位已相比制裁前宣称的95%市占率大幅收缩。中国企业中，华为成为最大赢家，出货量约81.2万张AI芯片，占据近20%的市场份额。华为持续推动AI处理器研发，近期发布的Atlas 350 AI加速卡，据称性能可达英伟达专供中国市场的“缩水版”H20芯片的近三倍，展现了显著的技术追赶势头。

隶属阿里巴巴的半导体公司平头哥（T-Head）以25.6万张的出货量位居第三。AMD则以16万张出货量、4%的份额位列第四。百度的昆仑芯（Kunlunxin）与中国AI芯片企业寒武纪（Cambricon）各自出货11.6万张，并列前五。

这一市场结构的剧变直接源于美国持续升级的出口管制政策。2023年，美国禁止英伟达和AMD向中国销售其最先进的AI芯片，但中国企业仍可采购性能受限的版本，如英伟达H20和AMD MI308。2025年4月，特朗普政府一度全面禁止所有AI GPU对华出口，迫使中国公司全面转向国产芯片。尽管相关禁令在2025年7月对H20和MI308有所放宽，但随后美国商务部长关于“追加限制”的言论又导致中国企业暂停下单。直至2025年12月，政策再次逆转，英伟达最终获准向中国特定机构和应用场景出售H200芯片，但整个过程充满波折和不确定性。

北京方面正面临一个战略困境：一方面希望扶持国内半导体产业，实现技术自主；另一方面又需要让本国AI科技公司在全球舞台上保持竞争力。尽管中国芯片制造商近年来进步神速，但在AI数据中心芯片领域，仍被认为落后英伟达和AMD五到十年。然而，从本土厂商不断增长的市场份额来看，中国政府的扶持努力正在产生成效。

展望未来，华盛顿允许英伟达向中国销售H200芯片的举措，能否帮助其在2026年重拾失地尚是未知数。即使中国公司有意大量采购这些AI GPU，北京有意将部分需求导向国产半导体的政策导向，也可能使英伟达难以恢复到制裁前的市场主导地位。中国AI芯片市场已进入一个由地缘政治、技术竞赛和本土化政策共同塑造的新阶段。

items.title: Gigabyte X870E Aorus Xtreme AI Top Motherboard Review: Solid flagship, but the X3D version is what you want today
items.description: The Gigabyte X870E Aorus Xtreme AI Top delivers strong performance, premium features, and a slick appearance, but high pricing and newer refresh boards, like the X3D version, make it a tough sell unless you snag a refurb deal.
items.content: Gigabyte’s X870E Aorus Xtreme AI Top has finally landed in our lab for testing. The AI Top has been out for a while now and is the pinnacle of AM5 motherboards for the brand. This version offers plenty of awesome things, but it also made some curious choices for a high-end motherboard. First, you get a premium product through and through. From the appearance to the features, there’s no doubt it’s a quality offering. And now priced at $599.99 for a refurb (but still over $1,200 from a 3rd-party seller new), it’s one of the more expensive ones new, as it’s no longer available in large numbers, given the newer X3D version.The Xtreme AI Top comes with four M.2 sockets (one PCIe 5.0 x4) and four SATA ports for storage, dual 10 GbE ports and fast Wi-Fi 7, last-gen flagship-class audio, plenty of USB ports including 10 on the rear IO (two USB4 40 Gbps Type-C), and even has multiple DIY-friendly features (including screwless M.2 designs, to EZ Wi-Fi plugs) to entice you into buying. Using the latest BIOS, it also enhances X3D chips' performance by simply enabling an option in the BIOS, just like the more expensive X3D (read: refresh) boards - though you don’t get any of the updated features some may have. We do like how it looks overall, but we were surprised not to find an LCD screen on the VRM heatsink, as most of its peers had (and even on their original AM5 flagships).Performance on this board using the latest BIOS (F12a with AGESA 1.3.0.0) was among the best we’ve seen. It’s this way because, by default (we only enabled Expo profile for the RAM; Expo AI Boost, and high bandwidth support were disabled), there’s some magic sauce in the RAM bandwidth, as you’ll see later, improving all facets of the AIDA64 testing rather significantly.The increased bandwidth and slightly reduced latency improved some of our results, yielding some of the fastest times we’ve seen in Handbrake, and it did very well in gaming. In short, this board performs quite well across a wide range of tests and games, thanks to the bandwidth increase that seems baked in when enabling the Expo profile on the base kit.Below, we’ll examine the board's performance and other features to determine whether it deserves a spot on our list of the best motherboards. But before we share test results and discuss details, here are the specifications from Gigabyte’s website.Gigabyte X870E Aorus Xtreme AI Top at Amazon for $899.99Specifications of the X870E AI TopSwipe to scroll horizontallySocketAM5 (LGA 1718)ChipsetX870Form FactorE-ATXVoltage Regulator22 Phase (18x 110A SPS MOSFETs for Vcore)Video Ports(1) HDMI (v2.1)(1) HDMI (Front, v 1.4)(2) USB4 Type-C (DP)USB Ports(2) USB 4 (40 Gbps) Type-C(1) USB 3.2 Gen 2 (10 Gbps Type-C(4) USB 3.2 Gen 1 (5 Gbps)(4) USB 2.0 (480 Mbps)Network Jacks(2) 10 GbEAudio Jacks(2) Analog + SPDIFLegacy Ports/Jacks✗Other Ports/Jack✗PCIe x16(1) v5.0 (x16/x8)(1) v5.0 (x8)(1) v4.0 (x2)PCIe x8✗PCIe x4✗PCIe x1✗CrossFire/SLI✗DIMM Slots(4) DDR5-8800(OC), 256GB CapacityM.2 Sockets(1) PCIe 5.0 x4 (128 Gbps) / PCIe (up to 110mm)(2) PCIe 4.0 x4 (64 Gbps) / PCIe (up to 110mm)(1) PCIe 4.0 x2 (32 Gbps) / PCIe (up to 110mm)Supports RAID 0/1/5/10SATA Ports(4) SATA3 6 GbpsSupports RAID 0/1USB Headers(1) USB v3.2 Gen 2x2 (20 Gbps) Type-C(1) USB v3.2 Gen 2 (10 Gbps)(2) USB v3.2 Gen 1 (5 Gbps)(2) USB v2.0 (480 Mbps)Fan/Pump Headers(10) 4-Pin (Accepts PWM and DC)RGB Headers(3) 3-pin ARGB headers(1) 4-pin RGB LED strip headerDiagnostics Panel(1) Debug port(1) 2-character DebugInternal Button/SwitchPower/Reset buttonsSATA Controllers✗Ethernet Controller(s)(1) Marvell AQtion AQC113C (10 GbE)Wi-Fi / BluetoothQualcomm QCNCM865 Wi-Fi 7 - 320 MHz, 6 GHz, 5.8 GHz, BT 5.4 USB ControllersASMedia ASM4242 HD Audio CodecRealtek ALC1220DDL/DTS✗ / ✗Warranty3 YearsToday's best Gigabyte X870E Aorus Xtreme AI Top deals $599.99View $899.99ViewWe check over 250 million products every day for the best pricesInside the BoxInside the retail packaging are a wide variety of accessories, including an inline USB DAC for audio and a small ~60mm fan to help cool the RAM. Outside of that, it comes with your typical collection of accessories, though it is a bit light compared to other flagship-class motherboards that come with additional add-in-cards (for more M.2), for example. See the complete list below:Installation guide/User’s Manual/StickersESSential USB DAC (Type-C to 3.5mm)(2) SATA cablesDDR5 Windblade fanG-ConnectorQuick connect Wi-Fi antenna(2) Thermistor cablesSpeaker(2) velcro stripsDesign of the Aorus AI TopImage 1 of 6(Image credit: Future)(Image credit: Future)(Image credit: Future)(Image credit: Future)(Image credit: Future)(Image credit: Future)The Aorus Xtreme AI Top looks the part of a premium motherboard, with only a small amount of the 8-layer PCB exposed. There’s a large, oversized heatsink with branded (Aorus) RGB, the only integrated RGB feature. There’s a large heatsink for the top PCIe 5.0 M.2 socket, with the model listed across the top. The bottom heatsink is a large plate that connects via magnets on the left, above the audio, and has a simple latch for removal. On top of it is the Aorus Falcon on a glossy surface. I was surprised not to see an LCD, since most of this board’s flagship competitors have one. That said, the newest iteration of this board, the Aorus Xtreme X3D AI Top, does. So if you love the board and insist on an integrated screen, you’ll have to step up to the new one (and pay more than you'd pay for this one).Stay On the Cutting Edge: Get the Tom's Hardware NewsletterGet Tom's Hardware's best news and in-depth reviews, straight to your inbox.Contact me with news and offers from other Future brandsReceive email from us on behalf of our trusted partners or sponsorsOverall, we like the look, and it gives off the premium vibes you expect from a flagship-class offering, but it isn’t the standout of the group (that would go to the Asus ROG Crosshair X870E Glacial we reviewed). (Image credit: Future)Zooming in on the front, we get a better look at the connector-free front side and how clean it looks. We won’t talk much about the VRM heatsinks (covered above), Focusing on the top half, starting on the left, we get a better look at the ‘polymo’-like RGB feature on top of the huge heatsinks. The VRM heatsink uses fins (with a ‘nano carbon coating’), a lot of mass, and a heatpipe connecting both to dissipate heat from the MOSFETs below. Between this and the MOSFETs below, you can run and overclock any compatible chip to its limit. The top has an infinity mirror look, which is cool, but again, I want a screen like the others at this price point. Above that are the two 8-pin EPS “UD” (Ultra Durable) power connectors for the CPU.Just past the socket area to the right are the DRAM slots. Here, the two primary slots (A2/B2) use reinforcement, while all four have locking mechanisms on both sides to secure the sticks in place. Gigabyte lists support of up to DDR5-8800, which is plenty fast for the platform. We didn’t have any issues running any three of our kits, up to DDR5-8000 with an APU, as expected.Above the DRAM slots are your first three (of 10) 4-pin fan headers. Each header supports both PWM- and DC-controlled devices and delivers 2A/24W, which is plenty for fans and pumps. Control over the headers is handled by the BIOS, Smart Fan 6, or Gigabyte’s Control Center (GCC) software. Just to the right are a 4-pin RGB header (also controlled through GCC and the RGB Fusion Applet inside) and a 2-pin reset jumper. At the top right is the first 3-pin ARGB header.Rounding the corner and working our way down the right edge, we first hit the “EZ Debug Zone,” which includes power and reset buttons (the latter a multi-key you can assign various functions), the Debug LED (four LEDs), and the 80 Port 2-character debug display. Between them, you’ll have a good idea of any issues that arise during the POST process and holding up getting into Windows. Next is the 24-pin ATX power connector for the board, another 3-pin fan header, a 2-pin temperature header (use the included thermistors), and the front HDMI output for easy installation of additional monitors (think an internal display for sensors or the like). Last but not least is the front panel USB 3.2 Gen 2x2 (20 Gbps) connector. (Image credit: Future)Power delivery on the X870E Aorus Extreme AI Top consists of 22 phases, with 18 dedicated to Vcore. Power heads from the 8-pin EPS connector(s) in the top-left corner, onto an Infineon XDPE192C3D 12-channel controller. From there, it moves to the 18 Infineon PMC41430 110A SPS MOSFETs. It’s a robust solution that will handle anything you throw at it, including the Ryzen 9 9950X, the recently released Ryzen 7 9850X3D (fastest gaming processor around), or the Ryzen 9 9950X3D2, even if you want to use extreme ( sub-ambient) cooling methods. (Image credit: Future)On the bottom half of the board, starting on the front-left side and under the plate heatsink, is the audio section. Gigabyte equips the Xtreme AI Top with a last-gen flagship Realtek ALC1220 codec and several audio capacitors (including the red WIMA). We’d like to see the latest generation on the newest boards, but this solution is perfectly acceptable for an overwhelming majority of buyers. The company also includes a USB DAC that connects your 3.5mm headphones to the DAC and Type-C to the PC.In the middle of the board, under the heatsinks, are the four M.2 sockets. The top socket (M2A_CPU), with its own larger heatsink, supports up to 110mm devices and runs at PCIe 5.0 x4 (128 Gbps). Under the plate heatsink are three other sockets, each supporting up to 110mm modules. The top-most, M2D_SB and M2B_SB, run at PCIe 4.0 x4 (64 Gbps) again, supporting up to 110mm devices, and connect through the chipset. I’m surprised we don’t see a second PCIe 5.0-capable M.2 socket on a flagship, and others do have five or more. This isn’t a problem for most users, but the count is comparatively short here.Visible around the plate heatsink are three full-length PCIe slots. The top two connect through the CPU and are reinforced with their Titanium PCIe UD Slot X, which connects to the CPU. The top slot supports PCIe 5.0 x16 (also x8), while the second supports PCIe 5.0 x8. The top slot is your PCIe 5.0 x16 slot for your video card, and it also uses the PCIe EZ-Latch Plus to secure your expensive graphics card. Simply install the card, and it locks, then press the button to remove. Easy breezy. The bottom full-length slot connects to the chipset, supports PCIe 4.0 x4, and is used for expansion cards.Moving right, past the chipset, the first item we run into next to the PCIe release button is a voltage read point. There are several holes in the PCB where you’d put a probe to read the voltage of multiple important things, including VCore, VDDIO, VDD MISC, and more. If you need accurate voltage readings for your overclocking adventures (or just for curiosity's sake), your best bet is to use these read points, as software can sometimes be inaccurate. Moving down, we see the four SATA ports, two more 4-pin fan headers, and a 19-pin front USB 3.2 Gen1 (5 Gbps) connector.We also captured some pictures of the chips Gigabyte uses on this board. We see ASMedia for USB, Infineon for PWM controller and MOSFETs, along with Realtek covering audio, PWM control, and USB. Networking duties are handled by Marvell and Qualcomm (for rev 1.0, Mediatek for rev 1.1).Image 1 of 4(Image credit: Future)(Image credit: Future)(Image credit: Future)(Image credit: Future)At the bottom of the board are several headers offering typical connectivity for the location. There’s nothing really missing or worth a specific mention. Below we’ve listed all the connections across the bottom (rear) of the board.Front panel audio(2) 3-pin ARGB headersDebug headerSPI TPM header(3) 4-pin system fan headers(2) USB 2.0 headersUSB 3.2 Gen 1 (5 Gbps) header4-pin fan headerFront panel (Image credit: Future)The rear IO on the Aorus Xtreme AI Top offers enough connectivity, including 10 USB ports. Starting on the left, we see the convenient Clear CMOS and Q-Flash Plus buttons (for CPU-less BIOS flashing), and next to that is the rear HDMI (v2.1) port for using the integrated graphics on most CPUs. There are two USB4 (40 Gbps) Type-C ports, six USB 3.2 Gen 2 (10 Gbps) ports (red), and two USB 2.0 (480 Mbps) ports (black). Next are the two Marevell AQTion 10 GbE ports, the Mediatek-based (or Qualcomm depending on board version) Wi-Fi 7 (5.8 Gbps) quick connect, and, finally, the audio stack comprising line out, mic-in, and SPDIF optical output. I would have liked to see more USB ports here, like the competition, but most users won’t need or miss them.MORE: Best MotherboardsMORE: How To Choose A MotherboardMORE: All Motherboard ContentGigabyte X870E Aorus Xtreme AI Top: Price Comparison $599.99View $899.99ViewWe check over 250 million products every day for the best pricespowered by
items.author: Joe Shields
items.titleZh: 技嘉X870E Aorus Xtreme AI Top主板评测：可靠的旗舰款，但X3D版本才是当下想要的选择
items.descriptionZh:
技嘉X870E Aorus Xtreme AI Top主板近日送达实验室进行评测。作为技嘉AM5平台曾经的旗舰型号，这款主板代表了品牌在AM5时代的设计与技术巅峰。尽管其全新版本市场存量已不多（被更新的X3D版本取代），且第三方售价仍高达1200美元以上（官方翻新价为599.99美元），但它依然是一款从外观到功能都彰显高品质的顶级产品。主板采用了E-ATX版型，基于AMD X870芯片组，支持AM5插槽（LGA 1718）的锐龙系列处理器。

**核心技术原理与创新点：**
该主板的核心设计围绕强大的供电、高速互联与用户友好体验展开。其电压调节模块（VRM）采用22相设计，其中18相为Vcore核心供电，每相搭载一颗英飞凌PMC41430 110A SPS MOSFET，并由一颗英飞凌XDPE192C3D 12通道控制器进行管理。这套供电方案足够应对包括Ryzen 9 9950X、Ryzen 7 9850X3D乃至采用极端散热的超频需求。
一个关键的性能“魔法”来自于其内存子系统。在主板上启用基础的EXPO内存超频配置文件后（无需开启EXPO AI Boost或高带宽支持），主板固件似乎内置了优化算法，能显著提升内存带宽并略微降低延迟。这项优化直接且全面地提升了AIDA64内存测试成绩，并转化为实际应用性能增益。
在扩展性方面，主板提供了四个M.2插槽，其中一条直连CPU，支持PCIe 5.0 x4（128 Gbps），其余三条通过芯片组，支持PCIe 4.0 x4或x2。值得注意的是，作为旗舰型号，它并未像部分竞品那样提供第二条PCIe 5.0 M.2接口或更多M.2插槽。存储方面另配备四个SATA 6 Gbps接口。
网络连接是另一大亮点，板载双Marvell AQtion AQC113C 10 GbE有线网卡和基于高通（或联发科，取决于版本）方案的Wi-Fi 7无线网卡，支持6 GHz频段和320 MHz信道。音频方案采用了上一代旗舰级Realtek ALC1220编解码器，并辅以高品质音频电容，同时随附一个外置USB DAC（ESSential芯片）以提升耳机音质。
设计上，主板采用了无螺丝固定的M.2散热片、EZ Wi-Fi插针等DIY友好特性。显卡插槽配备了PCIe EZ-Latch Plus便捷卡扣。然而，一个令人意外的“缺失”是：在VRM散热片上并未配备在同类高端主板上常见的LCD显示屏，该功能仅在其后续的X3D版本中提供。

**性能参数与对比分析：**
在搭载最新BIOS（F12a， AGESA 1.3.0.0）的测试中，该主板展现了顶尖的性能水平。
*   **内存与带宽：** 凭借前述的EXPO优化，内存带宽得到显著提升，延迟降低。这直接影响了综合性能测试。
*   **内容创作：** 在Handbrake视频转码测试中取得了最快的成绩之一。
*   **游戏性能：** 在各种游戏测试中表现优异。
*   **超频支持：** 官方标称内存支持最高DDR5-8800+（OC），实测中搭配APU可稳定运行DDR5-8000套条。
*   **对比语境：** 其性能表现与更昂贵的专属X3D版本主板在开启相同BIOS选项时相当，但后者可能具备一些额外的更新特性。与华硕ROG Crosshair X870E Glacial等竞品相比，其在某些设计（如无LCD屏）和扩展接口数量上有所不同，但核心性能处于同一梯队。

**技术影响与应用场景：**
1.  **对X3D处理器的增强支持：** 通过简单的BIOS选项启用，即可优化AMD锐龙X3D系列处理器的性能，这使该主板成为追求高性能游戏与内容创作用户的理想平台之一。
2.  **面向高端发烧友和专业创作者：** 双10GbE网卡和高速Wi-Fi 7非常适合需要大文件高速传输的网络环境。丰富的USB接口，包括两个USB4（40 Gbps Type-C）和多个10 Gbps接口，能满足大量外设连接需求。
3.  **极限超频与DIY玩家：** 强悍的VRM设计、板载电压测量点、Debug LED和双位数故障诊断码显示，为超频玩家提供了强大的调试能力。随附的DDR5风冷扇和多个温敏探头接口也体现了对极限散热的考量。
4.  **市场定位：** 作为已进入产品生命周期后期的旗舰，其翻新版本提供了以相对较低成本获得顶级AM5平台体验的机会，但对于追求最新特性（如板上LCD、更多PCIe 5.0 M.2）的用户，则需要考虑其后续的X3D版本或其他品牌竞品。

**总结：**
技嘉X870E Aorus Xtreme AI Top是一款综合实力强劲的旗舰级AM5主板。它通过扎实的供电设计、独特的内存带宽优化技术、超前的网络配置和丰富的扩展接口，提供了顶级的性能和连接性。虽然在一些“奢华”特性（如LCD屏）和M.2接口数量上较最新竞品略显保守，但其核心性能表现毋庸置疑。对于寻求稳定、高性能且接口全面的AM5平台用户，尤其是能够接受翻新品的买家，它仍然是一个极具吸引力的高端选择。其技术遗产也体现在后续型号中，继续影响着高端主板的设计方向。

Read the full story at The Verge.
items.content: If you’re tired of controlling Stream Deck devices by manually pushing buttons, then good news: Elgato will now let you delegate that task to a chatbot instead. The Stream Deck 7.4 software update released today introduces Model Context Protocol (MCP) support, allowing AI assistants like Claude, ChatGPT, and Nvidia G-Assist to find and activate Stream Deck actions on your behalf.“You still set up actions in Stream Deck app the same way you always have. MCP adds a new way to trigger them,” Elgato said in its announcement. “Once everything is connected, you can type or speak requests and your AI tool will trigger the matching Stream Deck action.”MCP — supported by companies like Microsoft, Anthropic, Figma, and Canva — is rapidly becoming the universal “USB cable” for artificial intelligence, allowing AI assistants to hook directly into third-party apps. The Elgato update essentially provides a hands-free way to trigger any macro commands assigned to your Stream Deck (be that physical devices or the digital app).Each MCP action has a description field that AI assistants use to find out what the action does and when to use it. Image: ElgatoYou can enable the feature by updating to the latest version of the Stream Deck app, opening “Preferences,”and tapping the “General” tab at the top of the app window. From there, you can check “Enable MCP Actions” to create a dedicated “MCP Actions” profile, with any actions placed within it becoming accessible to your connected AI tools.This is where you’ll find the option to enable MCP actions in the Stream Deck app settings. Image: ElgatoThe full setup requires an additional Node.js tool and Elgato MCP Server bridge to be installed on your computer to connect AI tools with the Stream Deck app. It’s a finicky process for anyone unfamiliar with MCP integrations, but thankfully Elgato has a full step-by-step installation guide available that’s simple to follow.
items.author: Jess Weatherbed
items.descriptionZh:
知名硬件品牌Elgato近日为其Stream Deck系列设备推出了一项突破性更新，通过软件版本7.4引入了对模型上下文协议（Model Context Protocol, MCP）的支持。这项更新将彻底改变用户与Stream Deck的交互方式——从传统的手动按键操作，转变为可由AI语音或文字助手代为执行。

**背景与上下文**  
Stream Deck是一款备受直播主、内容创作者和效率工作者喜爱的宏按键控制设备，用户可为其每个物理或虚拟按键分配特定操作（如切换场景、启动软件、发送指令等）。此前，所有操作均需手动触发。Elgato此次更新旨在整合日兴的AI助手生态，让用户能够通过自然语言指令，便捷地操控所有已设定的Stream Deck动作。

**核心技术原理与创新点**  
本次更新的核心在于集成了MCP协议。MCP正迅速成为AI领域的“通用USB电缆”，由微软、Anthropic、Figma和Canva等公司支持，它允许AI助手（如Claude、ChatGPT、Nvidia G-Assist）直接连接并控制第三方应用程序。Elgato在Stream Deck应用中为每个动作添加了一个“描述字段”，AI助手通过读取这些描述来理解动作功能及使用场景，从而在用户提出语音或文字请求时，自动匹配并触发对应的Stream Deck动作。

实现这一功能需要在电脑上安装一个额外的Node.js工具和Elgato MCP Server桥接程序，作为AI工具与Stream Deck应用之间的连接层。尽管设置过程对于不熟悉MCP集成的用户可能略显复杂，但Elgato提供了详尽易懂的逐步安装指南。

**操作与设置流程**  
用户只需将Stream Deck应用更新至最新版本，在“偏好设置”的“通用”选项卡中勾选“启用MCP动作”，即可创建一个专用的“MCP动作”配置文件。所有置于此配置文件内的动作都将自动对已连接的AI工具开放访问权限。

**技术影响与应用场景**  
这项更新标志着硬件宏控制设备与生成式AI助手深度整合的重要一步。它极大地扩展了Stream Deck的适用场景：
- **直播与内容创作**：主播可通过语音命令快速切换镜头、播放音效或调整灯光，无需中断演示或操作硬件。
- **工作效率提升**：用户能在专注于主要任务的同时，用自然语言指令一键执行复杂的多步骤自动化流程。
- **无障碍辅助**：为行动不便的用户提供了完全免提的设备控制方式。

从更广泛的产业视角看，Elgato此举进一步推动了MCP协议的普及，为其他硬件厂商与AI生态的整合提供了可行范本。未来，随着AI助手理解上下文能力的持续增强，此类“语音/文字驱动硬件”的交互模式有望成为智能办公和创作环境的新标准。

items.title: Oracle believed to have cut 10,000 positions across multiple divisions as mass layoffs begin to fuel AI investments — company is reportedly reducing headcount to fund data centers
items.description: Oracle reportedly cut over 10,000 positions based on reports from various employees. The move comes after the company has spent billions of dollars on AI infrastructure, with some saying that it will be in the red until 2030 after all this spending.

Subscribe to our newsletter Oracle has reportedly begun mass layoffs based on reports by various people who worked at the company. According to the BBC, one employee noted that around 10,000 positions have been affected based on the number of active staff accounts in the firm’s Slack messaging system so far. Other people from across the company have also made posts about the situation on social media, like LinkedIn.“Today, Oracle conducted a significant reduction in force that impacted some of the most talented, dedicated, and high-performing people I’ve had the privilege of working alongside,” Michael Shepherd, a Senior Operations Manager at Oracle, said on LinkedIn. “Let me be direct: this was not a performance action. The individuals affected were not let go because of anything they did or didn’t do. Many of them are the people you call when something is truly broken, the ones who show up early, stay late, and carry institutional knowledge that took years to build.”The company has not released a comment about its global reduction in force at the time of writing, but there have been reports that it would axe thousands of positions and freeze hiring earlier in March. Rumors say that the cloud infrastructure firm is culling its numbers after investing billions of dollars on hardware and betting big on AI. However, this much spending means that the company is expected to be in the red until 2030.Article continues below You may like Oracle reportedly set to axe thousands of jobs and freeze hiring as AI data center bets ignite financial perfect storm Despite AI chip boom and record high stock price, ASML to lay off employees Claimed 1,100% increase in AI-driven layoffs in 2025 might be misleading It’s rumored that many of the affected employees will be replaced by AI, a disturbing trend after Microsoft’s AI boss said that AI can replace every white-collar job in 18 months. Oracle isn’t the only one that’s been cutting employee numbers in recent months, with Dutch chip equipment maker ASML laying off 1,700 management workers and EA reducing headcount in Battlefield-related studios. Meta has not laid off employees yet, but there have been rumors that the company is reducing employee bonuses for the second time in a row as it spends billions on AI hardware and talent.This isn’t the only problem that Oracle is currently facing. Earlier this year, some of its bondholders sued the company for misleading statements after it borrowed $38 billion two months after releasing $18 billion of notes and bonds in September 2025. There have also been reports of disagreements between OpenAI, Oracle, and SoftBank regarding who should have the ultimate control of the Stargate project, with the planned 600MW expansion at the Abilene, Texas, campus getting scrapped.These AI-driven layoffs are sounding disturbing for the average worker, especially as many industry experts and company leaders have been warning about the disruption that AI will bring to the job market. However, OpenAI boss Sam Altman said that companies are just using 'AI washing' as an excuse for these job cuts that they would have otherwise done anyway. But whether this is true or not, it gives little comfort to the affected Oracle employees, especially during these uncertain times. items.titleZh: 甲骨文启动大规模裁员以注资AI，据称多个部门削减万名岗位——报道称公司正通过缩减人力来筹集数据中心建设资金。
items.descriptionZh:
据多方报道和公司内部人士消息，数据库与云服务巨头甲骨文（Oracle）已开始进行大规模裁员。英国广播公司（BBC）援引员工信息称，根据公司内部通信工具Slack上活跃员工账户数量的变化估算，此次裁员可能影响约10,000个职位。甲骨文公司高级运营经理迈克尔·谢泼德等多名员工在领英等社交平台上证实了裁员行动，并强调被裁员工多为高绩效、经验丰富的骨干人员，此次裁员并非基于个人绩效。

此次裁员行动并非毫无预兆。早在今年三月，已有报道称甲骨文计划削减数千个职位并冻结招聘。分析普遍认为，这一举措与公司向人工智能和云基础设施领域的激进转型战略密切相关。甲骨文近年来在AI硬件和数据中心领域投入了数十亿美元，但巨额投资也导致公司预计将面临持续亏损直至2030年。有传言指出，许多被削减的岗位将由人工智能技术接替，这呼应了此前微软AI负责人关于AI可能在18个月内取代所有白领工作的言论，引发了业界对AI引发就业市场颠覆的担忧。

值得关注的是，甲骨文并非近期唯一进行裁员的科技公司。荷兰芯片设备制造商ASML此前裁减了1,700名管理人员，电子艺界（EA）也削减了与《战地》系列相关工作室的人员。尽管Meta尚未启动裁员，但已连续两次削减员工奖金，同样是为了将更多资源投入AI硬件和人才争夺。

除了裁员风波，甲骨文还面临其他挑战。今年早些时候，部分债券持有人起诉公司，指控其在2025年9月发行180亿美元票据仅两个月后，又借款380亿美元，存在误导性陈述。此外，有报道称，甲骨文与OpenAI、软银在耗资巨大的“星门”（Stargate）AI数据中心项目控制权上存在分歧，导致原计划在德克萨斯州阿比林校区进行的600兆瓦扩容项目已被取消。

针对AI驱动裁员的趋势，OpenAI首席执行官萨姆·奥尔特曼提出了不同看法，认为许多公司只是以“AI洗白”为借口，进行本就计划进行的人员优化。然而，无论原因为何，对于正处在行业变革浪潮中的甲骨文员工而言，这一系列变动无疑带来了巨大的不确定性。

items.titleZh: 搭配技嘉X870 AORUS ELITE主板与海盗船5000D机箱，仅需611美元即可获得64GB海盗船复仇者内存+三星2TB PCIe 5.0 9100 Pro固态硬盘——纯白配色装机方案
items.descriptionZh:
近期PC组装者和硬件爱好者面临持续的市场压力。受数据中心AI部署狂潮导致的零部件价格飙升，以及中东冲突对供应链的连带影响，科技组件价格居高不下，天文数字般的通胀似乎未见尽头。尽管如此，业界仍在努力寻找计算机和科技硬件的优惠与省钱方案，以维持PC爱好者社区的活力。

Newegg平台近期出现了一套堪称完美的全白色PC组建起步套装，其核心亮点在于能以极低成本获取大容量高性能组件：仅需611美元即可购得64GB的 Corsair Vengeance内存和顶级规格的2TB三星9100 Pro固态硬盘。在当前市场环境下，仅一款速度与规格相近的64GB内存套件起价就可达800美元，使得此次捆绑优惠显得格外超值。若扩展至完整套装，用户只需支付1039.99美元，即可一并获得以下四件白色主题组件：64GB Corsair Vengeance DDR5-6400内存、2TB三星9100 Pro SSD、技嘉X870 Aorus Elite主板以及Corsair Frame 5000D RS机箱。

**套装组件技术细节与性能分析：**

1.  **Corsair Frame 5000D RS机箱**：采用高气流设计，配备穿孔网状面板以优化冷空气进入，确保组件维持在适宜工作温度。其高度可调的InfiniRail安装系统支持多种尺寸的风扇和散热器配置，为定制化散热方案提供灵活性。

2.  **技嘉X870 Aorus Elite主板**：冰白色外观，搭载16+2+2相供电设计。其创新性的EZ-latch免工具卡扣设计，使得安装或更换M.2 SSD及PCIe组件更为便捷。主板为VRM供电区和M.2硬盘配备了大量散热装甲，并集成Wi-Fi 7和2.5GbE网卡，为游戏或网络应用提供高速连接。

3.  **三星2TB 9100 Pro SSD**：作为市场上速度领先的PCIe 5.0固态硬盘之一，其顺序读取/写入速度分别高达14,700 MB/s和13,400 MB/s，随机读取/写入性能达1,850K/2,600K IOPS，耐用性评级为1200 TBW（总写入字节数）。2TB容量为游戏PC提供了充裕的系统与游戏存储空间。

4.  **Corsair Vengeance 64GB DDR5-6400内存套件**：包含两条32GB模块，运行频率为6400MHz，时序为CL32-40-40-84。在当前内存价格高企的背景下——甚至可能超过高端显卡——此套装内含的64GB大容量高性能内存成为了显著的成本节约点。

**价格对比与市场影响**：
该捆绑套餐原价为1949.96美元，现价1039.99美元，折扣幅度高达47%（节省909.97美元）。此优惠在组件普遍昂贵的市场环境中具有重要意义。虽然部分组件价格可能低于两年前水平，但当前的市场条件已截然不同。此类组合包是抵消整体装机成本上涨的有效方式之一。若其规格符合用户需求，则代表了当下一个难得的入手时机。

**总结与应用场景**：
此套装为打造一套整洁、高性能的全白色主题PC提供了理想的起步基础，尤其适合追求外观一致性及高性能的游戏玩家和内容创作者。在整体市场价格高企的背景下，通过信誉良好的零售商选择经过搭配的捆绑包，是获取关键组件、控制预算的务实策略。对于寻求进一步节省开支的用户，可持续关注各类专项硬件优惠页面，包括SSD/存储、硬盘、游戏显示器、显卡、CPU及主板等领域的促销信息。

Subscribe to our newsletter Do you remember Nvidia’s 3D Vision 2 glasses, which launched about a decade and a half ago? It isn’t clear whether retro gaming Redditor sinrivers does, exclaiming, “I can’t believe this find” after unearthing a pair buried in a thrift store’s home décor bric-a-brac section. They bought this sealed Nvidia retail box featuring the 3D glasses for just $2.99. That’s a great saving on the launch price of $149 or $99, depending on whether they included the IR transmitter. But what use are these artifacts in 2026?I can't believe this find from r/nvidiaIf we wind back the clock to the early 2010s, there was some momentum behind 3D gaming with the added magic of 3D monitors combined with active-shutter 3D glasses. This was the peak 3D monitor era, with several big-name monitor vendors supplying compatible 3D monitors and graphics cards with the requisite port selection. Big PC brands like Asus could provide a whole ecosystem at the time: monitor, glasses, and graphics card.Nvidia’s solution was 3D Vision (AMD offered HD3D), and to enjoy the experience as intended, you would want a compatible GPU plus a LightBoost-certified monitor, providing both a 3D HDMI 1.4 input and a dual-link DVI input. On the human side, you’d wear active-shutter glasses like these Nvidia 3D Vision 2 spectacles, and an IR emitter was also necessary – but sometimes built into the 3D monitor you bought.Article continues below You may like Enthusiast scores watercooled dual Nvidia GTX Titan X GPUs for $86 Shopper walks out with a $4.99 Radeon RX 5700 XT GPU from Goodwill Tinkerer builds DIY VR headset with CRT screens repurposed from Sony Watchman The experience was loved by some, but others considered it overrated. For a snapshot of the ecosystem and its capabilities at the time, check out the Tom’s Hardware archives. For example, in September 2011, we published a 22-page, 18-game comparison featuring the best solutions for Nvidia 3D Vision vs AMD HD3D glasses users.Image 1 of 3(Image credit: Future)(Image credit: Future)(Image credit: Future)Whatever your opinion, it is undeniable that the 3D glasses and 3D monitor-driven experience faded rather quickly. So, what can sinrivers do with their $2.99 bargain today?As the simplest option, they could leave the package untouched as a shrink-wrapped pristine tech artifact. It would also probably be possible to make a quick profit through sites like eBay. Alternatively, if enough complementary ecosystem components are within sinrivers’ grasp, there are classic 3D gaming experiences of the era to enjoy, some 3D movies of the era to soak up, and even some emulators covering consoles of the era that support this system. Please note that Nvidia removed 3D Vision support from its GeForce drivers in 2019. items.author: Mark Tyson
items.titleZh: PC爱好者2.99美元淘到NVIDIA 3D Vision 2古董眼镜——这款2011年问世时售价149美元的PC游戏文物，曾是英伟达眼中游戏未来的"昔日愿景"
items.descriptionZh:
近日，一位名为 sinrivers 的复古游戏爱好者在 Reddit 上分享了一次令人惊叹的发现：他在一家二手商店的家居装饰杂货区，以仅 2.99 美元的价格购得了一套全新未拆封的 Nvidia 3D Vision 2 眼镜。这与其最初发布时 149 美元（含红外发射器）或 99 美元的售价相比，堪称“考古”级别的捡漏。这一发现将人们的记忆带回了约十五年前，即 2010 年代初期，那曾是 3D 游戏与 3D 显示器短暂而辉煌的巅峰时代。

当时，为了获得理想的 3D 游戏体验，用户需要一套完整的生态系统支持。核心是兼容的显卡（Nvidia 的解决方案是 3D Vision，AMD 则提供 HD3D）和经过 LightBoost 认证的 3D 显示器。这类显示器必须同时提供 3D HDMI 1.4 输入和双链路 DVI 输入。用户需要佩戴如 Nvidia 3D Vision 2 这样的主动快门式 3D 眼镜，其镜片能够与显示器的刷新率同步快速开合，分别为左右眼提供交替图像，从而在大脑中形成立体视觉。一个红外发射器（有时会集成在显示器中）负责向眼镜发送同步信号。像华硕这样的大厂当时甚至能提供包括显示器、眼镜和显卡在内的完整套装。

就性能和体验而言，这项技术在当时引起了两极分化的评价。一些玩家热爱其带来的沉浸感，而另一些人则认为它被高估了。Tom‘s Hardware 在 2011 年 9 月曾发布过一份长达 22 页、涵盖 18 款游戏的深度对比评测，详细分析了 Nvidia 3D Vision 与 AMD HD3D 解决方案的优劣。尽管在特定硬件和游戏上能实现令人印象深刻的效果，但整体而言，3D 游戏生态未能持续发展。其衰落可归因于多种因素：体验质量因内容和用户生理差异而不同，需要高昂的专用硬件投入，以及佩戴眼镜的不便和可能的视觉疲劳。最终，这项技术迅速被市场边缘化，Nvidia 也在 2019 年从其 GeForce 驱动程序中移除了对 3D Vision 的支持。

那么，在 2026 年的今天，这盒全新的“科技古董”有何用武之地？其应用场景已从主流实用转向了怀旧与收藏。首先，最直接的选择是将其保持原封包装状态，作为一件记录 PC 硬件发展史上特定篇章的完美藏品。其次，通过 eBay 等平台转手，很可能快速获利，因为对于收藏家或复古硬件爱好者而言，全新未拆封的产品具有特殊价值。最后，如果持有者能设法凑齐一整套当年的生态系统组件——包括兼容的显卡、3D 显示器和红外发射器——理论上仍可重温那个时代的经典 3D 游戏、观看当时的 3D 电影，甚至通过支持该系统的模拟器体验旧主机游戏的 3D 效果。当然，这需要克服驱动兼容性等挑战，更多是出于情怀与技术考古的乐趣。

总而言之，这则新闻不仅讲述了一次有趣的二手市场发现，更折射出一段曾经被寄予厚望、却最终昙花一现的消费电子技术史。Nvidia 3D Vision 2 眼镜从一个侧面见证了 3D 显示技术在游戏领域探索的兴衰。

items.titleZh: AMS设计中的因果推断（佛罗里达大学）
items.descriptionZh:
近日，佛罗里达大学发表了一篇题为《面向AMS电路设计的因果AI：可解释参数效应分析》的技术论文。该研究聚焦于解决模拟混合信号电路设计中长期存在的瓶颈问题。

模拟混合信号电路因其高度非线性和对连续现实世界信号的处理特性，使得传统基于数据驱动的人工智能模型难以对其进行精确建模，这与相对规则的数字电路设计形成鲜明对比。目前，AMS设计严重依赖设计师的经验和耗时费力的迭代仿真，导致设计周期长、成本高昂。论文的核心在于引入因果推断理论，旨在弥合高度结构化的电路设计知识与纯数据驱动的AI黑箱模型之间的鸿沟。

研究团队提出的创新方法并非简单地将AI用作性能预测器，而是构建了一个**结构因果模型**，以揭示电路设计参数（如晶体管尺寸、偏置电压）与电路性能指标（如增益、带宽、功耗）之间内在的**因果关系**，而非仅仅统计相关性。这使得AI模型具备了可解释性：设计师不仅能知道调整某个参数会导致性能如何变化，还能理解其背后的物理或电路原理。关键技术工具包括**反事实分析**，即回答“如果当初我选择了不同的参数值，结果会怎样？”这类在设计迭代中至关重要的问题。

在性能验证方面，该方法相较于传统的黑盒机器学习模型（如神经网络）展现出显著优势。它能够在**小样本数据**下有效工作，这对于仿真成本极高的AMS设计至关重要。同时，模型输出的因果图直接指明了关键设计参数及其影响路径，大幅提升了设计洞察的效率。论文通过基准电路（如运算放大器、锁相环）的案例研究进行了验证，展示了如何利用因果模型快速定位性能瓶颈并指导优化方向，减少了不必要的仿真次数。

这项技术的潜在影响深远。它将推动AMS设计从“经验驱动+试错”模式向“知识驱动+AI辅助推理”模式演进。具体应用场景包括：加速高性能计算、汽车电子、医疗设备中的定制化AMS模块设计；为新手设计师提供强大的决策支持工具，缩短学习曲线；以及在工艺节点迁移时，快速复用和调整既有设计知识。总体而言，将因果AI引入AMS设计，标志着该领域向更智能、更可解释、更高效的设计自动化迈出了关键一步。

history.title: Nvidia market share in China falls to less than 60% — Chinese chip makers deliver 1.65 million AI GPUs as the government pushes data centers to use domestic chips
history.description: Local chip makers take 41% of the Chinese AI semiconductor market, while Nvidia's market share falls to 55% — down from the company's claimed high of 95%.
history.content: Copy link Facebook X Whatsapp Reddit Pinterest Flipboard Email Share this article 2 Join the conversation Follow us Add us as a preferred source on Google Newsletter Tom's Hardware Stay On the Cutting Edge: Get the Tom's Hardware Newsletter Get Tom's Hardware's best news and in-depth reviews, straight to your inbox. You are now subscribed Your newsletter sign-up was successful An account already exists for this email address, please log in. Subscribe to our newsletter Chinese semiconductor firms have taken a big chunk of the domestic market, claiming 41% of the local AI server market and delivering 1.65 million AI GPUs out of a total of 4 million units in 2025. IDC numbers reported by Reuters claim that Nvidia still leads with a 55% market share, shipping an estimated 2.2 million cards, but this is a major contraction compared to the company’s claimed 95% market share before sanctions.Huawei is reported to be the big winner among the Chinese chipmakers, shipping around 812,000 AI chips or nearly 20% of the market. The Shenzhen-based firm is continuing development of AI processors, with the company launching its Atlas 350 AI accelerator last week, which is claimed to have nearly three times the performance of Nvidia H20 chips. T-Head, which is owned by Alibaba, the e-commerce platform widely known as China’s Amazon, holds a distant third place with 256,000 units sold.AMD sits just outside of the top three chipmakers in China, shipping 160,000 units for a 4% share of the domestic AI chip market. Baidu’s Kunlunxin AI chip subsidiary and Chinese AI chip maker Cambricon round out the top five, with each company delivering 116,000 cards.Article continues below You may like Nvidia China market share to drastically decrease from 66% to 8%, analysts claim China’s GPU cloud consolidates around Baidu and Huawei as domestic AI chips scale up Chinese companies reportedly considering sourcing H200 chips from the black market as chips held at the border Even though the U.S. banned Nvidia and AMD from selling their most advanced chips to China in 2023, many Chinese tech firms still favored nerfed versions of their latest AI GPUs, like the Nvidia H20 and AMD MI308. However, U.S. President Donald Trump completely banned all AI GPU exports in April 2025, forcing Chinese companies to rely on domestic chip makers.Trump reversed the ban on the H20 and MI308 in July 2025, but Chinese companies were told to stop ordering Nvidia’s chips after U.S. Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick’s “addition” comments during an interview. In December 2025, Trump made a complete U-turn and finally allowed Nvidia to ship the H200 to China, but it took several months before Chinese companies were allowed to order the U.S.-only chips, and only for specific institutions and applications.Beijing is facing a dilemma as it wants to support its domestic chip industry but also wants its AI tech companies to remain competitive on the global stage. While Chinese chip makers have advanced by leaps and bounds in recent years, it still lags five to ten years in AI data center chips compared to Nvidia and AMD. Despite that, the Chinese government’s efforts seem to be paying off, as seen by the increasing market share of local chip makers.We have yet to see if Washington’s move to allow Nvidia to sell its H200 chips to China will see the company regain its lost market share in 2026. But even if Chinese companies are eager to purchase these AI GPUs en masse, Beijing’s effort to redirect some of the demand towards domestic semiconductors will likely mean that Nvidia would have a hard time returning to pre-sanctions market share.Stay On the Cutting Edge: Get the Tom's Hardware NewsletterGet Tom's Hardware's best news and in-depth reviews, straight to your inbox.Contact me with news and offers from other Future brandsReceive email from us on behalf of our trusted partners or sponsors Follow Tom's Hardware on Google News, or add us as a preferred source, to get our latest news, analysis, & reviews in your feeds.

history.titleZh: 英伟达在华市场份额跌破60%——国产AI GPU交付165万颗，政府力推数据中心采用国产芯片
history.descriptionZh:
根据国际数据公司（IDC）通过路透社披露的报告，中国本土半导体企业在国内人工智能（AI）服务器芯片市场取得了显著进展。2025年，中国市场共出货约400万张AI GPU（图形处理器），其中中国公司出货量达到165万张，占据了41%的国内市场份額。这一变化标志着市场格局的重大重塑。

尽管英伟达（Nvidia）仍以55%的市场份额（约220万张出货量）保持领先，但其地位已相比制裁前宣称的95%市占率大幅收缩。中国企业中，华为成为最大赢家，出货量约81.2万张AI芯片，占据近20%的市场份额。华为持续推动AI处理器研发，近期发布的Atlas 350 AI加速卡，据称性能可达英伟达专供中国市场的“缩水版”H20芯片的近三倍，展现了显著的技术追赶势头。

隶属阿里巴巴的半导体公司平头哥（T-Head）以25.6万张的出货量位居第三。AMD则以16万张出货量、4%的份额位列第四。百度的昆仑芯（Kunlunxin）与中国AI芯片企业寒武纪（Cambricon）各自出货11.6万张，并列前五。

这一市场结构的剧变直接源于美国持续升级的出口管制政策。2023年，美国禁止英伟达和AMD向中国销售其最先进的AI芯片，但中国企业仍可采购性能受限的版本，如英伟达H20和AMD MI308。2025年4月，特朗普政府一度全面禁止所有AI GPU对华出口，迫使中国公司全面转向国产芯片。尽管相关禁令在2025年7月对H20和MI308有所放宽，但随后美国商务部长关于“追加限制”的言论又导致中国企业暂停下单。直至2025年12月，政策再次逆转，英伟达最终获准向中国特定机构和应用场景出售H200芯片，但整个过程充满波折和不确定性。

北京方面正面临一个战略困境：一方面希望扶持国内半导体产业，实现技术自主；另一方面又需要让本国AI科技公司在全球舞台上保持竞争力。尽管中国芯片制造商近年来进步神速，但在AI数据中心芯片领域，仍被认为落后英伟达和AMD五到十年。然而，从本土厂商不断增长的市场份额来看，中国政府的扶持努力正在产生成效。

展望未来，华盛顿允许英伟达向中国销售H200芯片的举措，能否帮助其在2026年重拾失地尚是未知数。即使中国公司有意大量采购这些AI GPU，北京有意将部分需求导向国产半导体的政策导向，也可能使英伟达难以恢复到制裁前的市场主导地位。中国AI芯片市场已进入一个由地缘政治、技术竞赛和本土化政策共同塑造的新阶段。

history.title: Gigabyte X870E Aorus Xtreme AI Top Motherboard Review: Solid flagship, but the X3D version is what you want today
history.description: The Gigabyte X870E Aorus Xtreme AI Top delivers strong performance, premium features, and a slick appearance, but high pricing and newer refresh boards, like the X3D version, make it a tough sell unless you snag a refurb deal.
history.content: Gigabyte’s X870E Aorus Xtreme AI Top has finally landed in our lab for testing. The AI Top has been out for a while now and is the pinnacle of AM5 motherboards for the brand. This version offers plenty of awesome things, but it also made some curious choices for a high-end motherboard. First, you get a premium product through and through. From the appearance to the features, there’s no doubt it’s a quality offering. And now priced at $599.99 for a refurb (but still over $1,200 from a 3rd-party seller new), it’s one of the more expensive ones new, as it’s no longer available in large numbers, given the newer X3D version.The Xtreme AI Top comes with four M.2 sockets (one PCIe 5.0 x4) and four SATA ports for storage, dual 10 GbE ports and fast Wi-Fi 7, last-gen flagship-class audio, plenty of USB ports including 10 on the rear IO (two USB4 40 Gbps Type-C), and even has multiple DIY-friendly features (including screwless M.2 designs, to EZ Wi-Fi plugs) to entice you into buying. Using the latest BIOS, it also enhances X3D chips' performance by simply enabling an option in the BIOS, just like the more expensive X3D (read: refresh) boards - though you don’t get any of the updated features some may have. We do like how it looks overall, but we were surprised not to find an LCD screen on the VRM heatsink, as most of its peers had (and even on their original AM5 flagships).Performance on this board using the latest BIOS (F12a with AGESA 1.3.0.0) was among the best we’ve seen. It’s this way because, by default (we only enabled Expo profile for the RAM; Expo AI Boost, and high bandwidth support were disabled), there’s some magic sauce in the RAM bandwidth, as you’ll see later, improving all facets of the AIDA64 testing rather significantly.The increased bandwidth and slightly reduced latency improved some of our results, yielding some of the fastest times we’ve seen in Handbrake, and it did very well in gaming. In short, this board performs quite well across a wide range of tests and games, thanks to the bandwidth increase that seems baked in when enabling the Expo profile on the base kit.Below, we’ll examine the board's performance and other features to determine whether it deserves a spot on our list of the best motherboards. But before we share test results and discuss details, here are the specifications from Gigabyte’s website.Gigabyte X870E Aorus Xtreme AI Top at Amazon for $899.99Specifications of the X870E AI TopSwipe to scroll horizontallySocketAM5 (LGA 1718)ChipsetX870Form FactorE-ATXVoltage Regulator22 Phase (18x 110A SPS MOSFETs for Vcore)Video Ports(1) HDMI (v2.1)(1) HDMI (Front, v 1.4)(2) USB4 Type-C (DP)USB Ports(2) USB 4 (40 Gbps) Type-C(1) USB 3.2 Gen 2 (10 Gbps Type-C(4) USB 3.2 Gen 1 (5 Gbps)(4) USB 2.0 (480 Mbps)Network Jacks(2) 10 GbEAudio Jacks(2) Analog + SPDIFLegacy Ports/Jacks✗Other Ports/Jack✗PCIe x16(1) v5.0 (x16/x8)(1) v5.0 (x8)(1) v4.0 (x2)PCIe x8✗PCIe x4✗PCIe x1✗CrossFire/SLI✗DIMM Slots(4) DDR5-8800(OC), 256GB CapacityM.2 Sockets(1) PCIe 5.0 x4 (128 Gbps) / PCIe (up to 110mm)(2) PCIe 4.0 x4 (64 Gbps) / PCIe (up to 110mm)(1) PCIe 4.0 x2 (32 Gbps) / PCIe (up to 110mm)Supports RAID 0/1/5/10SATA Ports(4) SATA3 6 GbpsSupports RAID 0/1USB Headers(1) USB v3.2 Gen 2x2 (20 Gbps) Type-C(1) USB v3.2 Gen 2 (10 Gbps)(2) USB v3.2 Gen 1 (5 Gbps)(2) USB v2.0 (480 Mbps)Fan/Pump Headers(10) 4-Pin (Accepts PWM and DC)RGB Headers(3) 3-pin ARGB headers(1) 4-pin RGB LED strip headerDiagnostics Panel(1) Debug port(1) 2-character DebugInternal Button/SwitchPower/Reset buttonsSATA Controllers✗Ethernet Controller(s)(1) Marvell AQtion AQC113C (10 GbE)Wi-Fi / BluetoothQualcomm QCNCM865 Wi-Fi 7 - 320 MHz, 6 GHz, 5.8 GHz, BT 5.4 USB ControllersASMedia ASM4242 HD Audio CodecRealtek ALC1220DDL/DTS✗ / ✗Warranty3 YearsToday's best Gigabyte X870E Aorus Xtreme AI Top deals $599.99View $899.99ViewWe check over 250 million products every day for the best pricesInside the BoxInside the retail packaging are a wide variety of accessories, including an inline USB DAC for audio and a small ~60mm fan to help cool the RAM. Outside of that, it comes with your typical collection of accessories, though it is a bit light compared to other flagship-class motherboards that come with additional add-in-cards (for more M.2), for example. See the complete list below:Installation guide/User’s Manual/StickersESSential USB DAC (Type-C to 3.5mm)(2) SATA cablesDDR5 Windblade fanG-ConnectorQuick connect Wi-Fi antenna(2) Thermistor cablesSpeaker(2) velcro stripsDesign of the Aorus AI TopImage 1 of 6(Image credit: Future)(Image credit: Future)(Image credit: Future)(Image credit: Future)(Image credit: Future)(Image credit: Future)The Aorus Xtreme AI Top looks the part of a premium motherboard, with only a small amount of the 8-layer PCB exposed. There’s a large, oversized heatsink with branded (Aorus) RGB, the only integrated RGB feature. There’s a large heatsink for the top PCIe 5.0 M.2 socket, with the model listed across the top. The bottom heatsink is a large plate that connects via magnets on the left, above the audio, and has a simple latch for removal. On top of it is the Aorus Falcon on a glossy surface. I was surprised not to see an LCD, since most of this board’s flagship competitors have one. That said, the newest iteration of this board, the Aorus Xtreme X3D AI Top, does. So if you love the board and insist on an integrated screen, you’ll have to step up to the new one (and pay more than you'd pay for this one).Stay On the Cutting Edge: Get the Tom's Hardware NewsletterGet Tom's Hardware's best news and in-depth reviews, straight to your inbox.Contact me with news and offers from other Future brandsReceive email from us on behalf of our trusted partners or sponsorsOverall, we like the look, and it gives off the premium vibes you expect from a flagship-class offering, but it isn’t the standout of the group (that would go to the Asus ROG Crosshair X870E Glacial we reviewed). (Image credit: Future)Zooming in on the front, we get a better look at the connector-free front side and how clean it looks. We won’t talk much about the VRM heatsinks (covered above), Focusing on the top half, starting on the left, we get a better look at the ‘polymo’-like RGB feature on top of the huge heatsinks. The VRM heatsink uses fins (with a ‘nano carbon coating’), a lot of mass, and a heatpipe connecting both to dissipate heat from the MOSFETs below. Between this and the MOSFETs below, you can run and overclock any compatible chip to its limit. The top has an infinity mirror look, which is cool, but again, I want a screen like the others at this price point. Above that are the two 8-pin EPS “UD” (Ultra Durable) power connectors for the CPU.Just past the socket area to the right are the DRAM slots. Here, the two primary slots (A2/B2) use reinforcement, while all four have locking mechanisms on both sides to secure the sticks in place. Gigabyte lists support of up to DDR5-8800, which is plenty fast for the platform. We didn’t have any issues running any three of our kits, up to DDR5-8000 with an APU, as expected.Above the DRAM slots are your first three (of 10) 4-pin fan headers. Each header supports both PWM- and DC-controlled devices and delivers 2A/24W, which is plenty for fans and pumps. Control over the headers is handled by the BIOS, Smart Fan 6, or Gigabyte’s Control Center (GCC) software. Just to the right are a 4-pin RGB header (also controlled through GCC and the RGB Fusion Applet inside) and a 2-pin reset jumper. At the top right is the first 3-pin ARGB header.Rounding the corner and working our way down the right edge, we first hit the “EZ Debug Zone,” which includes power and reset buttons (the latter a multi-key you can assign various functions), the Debug LED (four LEDs), and the 80 Port 2-character debug display. Between them, you’ll have a good idea of any issues that arise during the POST process and holding up getting into Windows. Next is the 24-pin ATX power connector for the board, another 3-pin fan header, a 2-pin temperature header (use the included thermistors), and the front HDMI output for easy installation of additional monitors (think an internal display for sensors or the like). Last but not least is the front panel USB 3.2 Gen 2x2 (20 Gbps) connector. (Image credit: Future)Power delivery on the X870E Aorus Extreme AI Top consists of 22 phases, with 18 dedicated to Vcore. Power heads from the 8-pin EPS connector(s) in the top-left corner, onto an Infineon XDPE192C3D 12-channel controller. From there, it moves to the 18 Infineon PMC41430 110A SPS MOSFETs. It’s a robust solution that will handle anything you throw at it, including the Ryzen 9 9950X, the recently released Ryzen 7 9850X3D (fastest gaming processor around), or the Ryzen 9 9950X3D2, even if you want to use extreme ( sub-ambient) cooling methods. (Image credit: Future)On the bottom half of the board, starting on the front-left side and under the plate heatsink, is the audio section. Gigabyte equips the Xtreme AI Top with a last-gen flagship Realtek ALC1220 codec and several audio capacitors (including the red WIMA). We’d like to see the latest generation on the newest boards, but this solution is perfectly acceptable for an overwhelming majority of buyers. The company also includes a USB DAC that connects your 3.5mm headphones to the DAC and Type-C to the PC.In the middle of the board, under the heatsinks, are the four M.2 sockets. The top socket (M2A_CPU), with its own larger heatsink, supports up to 110mm devices and runs at PCIe 5.0 x4 (128 Gbps). Under the plate heatsink are three other sockets, each supporting up to 110mm modules. The top-most, M2D_SB and M2B_SB, run at PCIe 4.0 x4 (64 Gbps) again, supporting up to 110mm devices, and connect through the chipset. I’m surprised we don’t see a second PCIe 5.0-capable M.2 socket on a flagship, and others do have five or more. This isn’t a problem for most users, but the count is comparatively short here.Visible around the plate heatsink are three full-length PCIe slots. The top two connect through the CPU and are reinforced with their Titanium PCIe UD Slot X, which connects to the CPU. The top slot supports PCIe 5.0 x16 (also x8), while the second supports PCIe 5.0 x8. The top slot is your PCIe 5.0 x16 slot for your video card, and it also uses the PCIe EZ-Latch Plus to secure your expensive graphics card. Simply install the card, and it locks, then press the button to remove. Easy breezy. The bottom full-length slot connects to the chipset, supports PCIe 4.0 x4, and is used for expansion cards.Moving right, past the chipset, the first item we run into next to the PCIe release button is a voltage read point. There are several holes in the PCB where you’d put a probe to read the voltage of multiple important things, including VCore, VDDIO, VDD MISC, and more. If you need accurate voltage readings for your overclocking adventures (or just for curiosity's sake), your best bet is to use these read points, as software can sometimes be inaccurate. Moving down, we see the four SATA ports, two more 4-pin fan headers, and a 19-pin front USB 3.2 Gen1 (5 Gbps) connector.We also captured some pictures of the chips Gigabyte uses on this board. We see ASMedia for USB, Infineon for PWM controller and MOSFETs, along with Realtek covering audio, PWM control, and USB. Networking duties are handled by Marvell and Qualcomm (for rev 1.0, Mediatek for rev 1.1).Image 1 of 4(Image credit: Future)(Image credit: Future)(Image credit: Future)(Image credit: Future)At the bottom of the board are several headers offering typical connectivity for the location. There’s nothing really missing or worth a specific mention. Below we’ve listed all the connections across the bottom (rear) of the board.Front panel audio(2) 3-pin ARGB headersDebug headerSPI TPM header(3) 4-pin system fan headers(2) USB 2.0 headersUSB 3.2 Gen 1 (5 Gbps) header4-pin fan headerFront panel (Image credit: Future)The rear IO on the Aorus Xtreme AI Top offers enough connectivity, including 10 USB ports. Starting on the left, we see the convenient Clear CMOS and Q-Flash Plus buttons (for CPU-less BIOS flashing), and next to that is the rear HDMI (v2.1) port for using the integrated graphics on most CPUs. There are two USB4 (40 Gbps) Type-C ports, six USB 3.2 Gen 2 (10 Gbps) ports (red), and two USB 2.0 (480 Mbps) ports (black). Next are the two Marevell AQTion 10 GbE ports, the Mediatek-based (or Qualcomm depending on board version) Wi-Fi 7 (5.8 Gbps) quick connect, and, finally, the audio stack comprising line out, mic-in, and SPDIF optical output. I would have liked to see more USB ports here, like the competition, but most users won’t need or miss them.MORE: Best MotherboardsMORE: How To Choose A MotherboardMORE: All Motherboard ContentGigabyte X870E Aorus Xtreme AI Top: Price Comparison $599.99View $899.99ViewWe check over 250 million products every day for the best pricespowered by
history.author: Joe Shields
history.titleZh: 技嘉X870E Aorus Xtreme AI Top主板评测：可靠的旗舰款，但X3D版本才是当下想要的选择
history.descriptionZh:
技嘉X870E Aorus Xtreme AI Top主板近日送达实验室进行评测。作为技嘉AM5平台曾经的旗舰型号，这款主板代表了品牌在AM5时代的设计与技术巅峰。尽管其全新版本市场存量已不多（被更新的X3D版本取代），且第三方售价仍高达1200美元以上（官方翻新价为599.99美元），但它依然是一款从外观到功能都彰显高品质的顶级产品。主板采用了E-ATX版型，基于AMD X870芯片组，支持AM5插槽（LGA 1718）的锐龙系列处理器。

**核心技术原理与创新点：**
该主板的核心设计围绕强大的供电、高速互联与用户友好体验展开。其电压调节模块（VRM）采用22相设计，其中18相为Vcore核心供电，每相搭载一颗英飞凌PMC41430 110A SPS MOSFET，并由一颗英飞凌XDPE192C3D 12通道控制器进行管理。这套供电方案足够应对包括Ryzen 9 9950X、Ryzen 7 9850X3D乃至采用极端散热的超频需求。
一个关键的性能“魔法”来自于其内存子系统。在主板上启用基础的EXPO内存超频配置文件后（无需开启EXPO AI Boost或高带宽支持），主板固件似乎内置了优化算法，能显著提升内存带宽并略微降低延迟。这项优化直接且全面地提升了AIDA64内存测试成绩，并转化为实际应用性能增益。
在扩展性方面，主板提供了四个M.2插槽，其中一条直连CPU，支持PCIe 5.0 x4（128 Gbps），其余三条通过芯片组，支持PCIe 4.0 x4或x2。值得注意的是，作为旗舰型号，它并未像部分竞品那样提供第二条PCIe 5.0 M.2接口或更多M.2插槽。存储方面另配备四个SATA 6 Gbps接口。
网络连接是另一大亮点，板载双Marvell AQtion AQC113C 10 GbE有线网卡和基于高通（或联发科，取决于版本）方案的Wi-Fi 7无线网卡，支持6 GHz频段和320 MHz信道。音频方案采用了上一代旗舰级Realtek ALC1220编解码器，并辅以高品质音频电容，同时随附一个外置USB DAC（ESSential芯片）以提升耳机音质。
设计上，主板采用了无螺丝固定的M.2散热片、EZ Wi-Fi插针等DIY友好特性。显卡插槽配备了PCIe EZ-Latch Plus便捷卡扣。然而，一个令人意外的“缺失”是：在VRM散热片上并未配备在同类高端主板上常见的LCD显示屏，该功能仅在其后续的X3D版本中提供。

**性能参数与对比分析：**
在搭载最新BIOS（F12a， AGESA 1.3.0.0）的测试中，该主板展现了顶尖的性能水平。
*   **内存与带宽：** 凭借前述的EXPO优化，内存带宽得到显著提升，延迟降低。这直接影响了综合性能测试。
*   **内容创作：** 在Handbrake视频转码测试中取得了最快的成绩之一。
*   **游戏性能：** 在各种游戏测试中表现优异。
*   **超频支持：** 官方标称内存支持最高DDR5-8800+（OC），实测中搭配APU可稳定运行DDR5-8000套条。
*   **对比语境：** 其性能表现与更昂贵的专属X3D版本主板在开启相同BIOS选项时相当，但后者可能具备一些额外的更新特性。与华硕ROG Crosshair X870E Glacial等竞品相比，其在某些设计（如无LCD屏）和扩展接口数量上有所不同，但核心性能处于同一梯队。

**技术影响与应用场景：**
1.  **对X3D处理器的增强支持：** 通过简单的BIOS选项启用，即可优化AMD锐龙X3D系列处理器的性能，这使该主板成为追求高性能游戏与内容创作用户的理想平台之一。
2.  **面向高端发烧友和专业创作者：** 双10GbE网卡和高速Wi-Fi 7非常适合需要大文件高速传输的网络环境。丰富的USB接口，包括两个USB4（40 Gbps Type-C）和多个10 Gbps接口，能满足大量外设连接需求。
3.  **极限超频与DIY玩家：** 强悍的VRM设计、板载电压测量点、Debug LED和双位数故障诊断码显示，为超频玩家提供了强大的调试能力。随附的DDR5风冷扇和多个温敏探头接口也体现了对极限散热的考量。
4.  **市场定位：** 作为已进入产品生命周期后期的旗舰，其翻新版本提供了以相对较低成本获得顶级AM5平台体验的机会，但对于追求最新特性（如板上LCD、更多PCIe 5.0 M.2）的用户，则需要考虑其后续的X3D版本或其他品牌竞品。

**总结：**
技嘉X870E Aorus Xtreme AI Top是一款综合实力强劲的旗舰级AM5主板。它通过扎实的供电设计、独特的内存带宽优化技术、超前的网络配置和丰富的扩展接口，提供了顶级的性能和连接性。虽然在一些“奢华”特性（如LCD屏）和M.2接口数量上较最新竞品略显保守，但其核心性能表现毋庸置疑。对于寻求稳定、高性能且接口全面的AM5平台用户，尤其是能够接受翻新品的买家，它仍然是一个极具吸引力的高端选择。其技术遗产也体现在后续型号中，继续影响着高端主板的设计方向。

history.title: AI can push your Stream Deck buttons for you
history.description:

Read the full story at The Verge.
history.content: If you’re tired of controlling Stream Deck devices by manually pushing buttons, then good news: Elgato will now let you delegate that task to a chatbot instead. The Stream Deck 7.4 software update released today introduces Model Context Protocol (MCP) support, allowing AI assistants like Claude, ChatGPT, and Nvidia G-Assist to find and activate Stream Deck actions on your behalf.“You still set up actions in Stream Deck app the same way you always have. MCP adds a new way to trigger them,” Elgato said in its announcement. “Once everything is connected, you can type or speak requests and your AI tool will trigger the matching Stream Deck action.”MCP — supported by companies like Microsoft, Anthropic, Figma, and Canva — is rapidly becoming the universal “USB cable” for artificial intelligence, allowing AI assistants to hook directly into third-party apps. The Elgato update essentially provides a hands-free way to trigger any macro commands assigned to your Stream Deck (be that physical devices or the digital app).Each MCP action has a description field that AI assistants use to find out what the action does and when to use it. Image: ElgatoYou can enable the feature by updating to the latest version of the Stream Deck app, opening “Preferences,”and tapping the “General” tab at the top of the app window. From there, you can check “Enable MCP Actions” to create a dedicated “MCP Actions” profile, with any actions placed within it becoming accessible to your connected AI tools.This is where you’ll find the option to enable MCP actions in the Stream Deck app settings. Image: ElgatoThe full setup requires an additional Node.js tool and Elgato MCP Server bridge to be installed on your computer to connect AI tools with the Stream Deck app. It’s a finicky process for anyone unfamiliar with MCP integrations, but thankfully Elgato has a full step-by-step installation guide available that’s simple to follow.
history.author: Jess Weatherbed
history.descriptionZh:
知名硬件品牌Elgato近日为其Stream Deck系列设备推出了一项突破性更新，通过软件版本7.4引入了对模型上下文协议（Model Context Protocol, MCP）的支持。这项更新将彻底改变用户与Stream Deck的交互方式——从传统的手动按键操作，转变为可由AI语音或文字助手代为执行。

**背景与上下文**  
Stream Deck是一款备受直播主、内容创作者和效率工作者喜爱的宏按键控制设备，用户可为其每个物理或虚拟按键分配特定操作（如切换场景、启动软件、发送指令等）。此前，所有操作均需手动触发。Elgato此次更新旨在整合日兴的AI助手生态，让用户能够通过自然语言指令，便捷地操控所有已设定的Stream Deck动作。

**核心技术原理与创新点**  
本次更新的核心在于集成了MCP协议。MCP正迅速成为AI领域的“通用USB电缆”，由微软、Anthropic、Figma和Canva等公司支持，它允许AI助手（如Claude、ChatGPT、Nvidia G-Assist）直接连接并控制第三方应用程序。Elgato在Stream Deck应用中为每个动作添加了一个“描述字段”，AI助手通过读取这些描述来理解动作功能及使用场景，从而在用户提出语音或文字请求时，自动匹配并触发对应的Stream Deck动作。

实现这一功能需要在电脑上安装一个额外的Node.js工具和Elgato MCP Server桥接程序，作为AI工具与Stream Deck应用之间的连接层。尽管设置过程对于不熟悉MCP集成的用户可能略显复杂，但Elgato提供了详尽易懂的逐步安装指南。

**操作与设置流程**  
用户只需将Stream Deck应用更新至最新版本，在“偏好设置”的“通用”选项卡中勾选“启用MCP动作”，即可创建一个专用的“MCP动作”配置文件。所有置于此配置文件内的动作都将自动对已连接的AI工具开放访问权限。

**技术影响与应用场景**  
这项更新标志着硬件宏控制设备与生成式AI助手深度整合的重要一步。它极大地扩展了Stream Deck的适用场景：
- **直播与内容创作**：主播可通过语音命令快速切换镜头、播放音效或调整灯光，无需中断演示或操作硬件。
- **工作效率提升**：用户能在专注于主要任务的同时，用自然语言指令一键执行复杂的多步骤自动化流程。
- **无障碍辅助**：为行动不便的用户提供了完全免提的设备控制方式。

从更广泛的产业视角看，Elgato此举进一步推动了MCP协议的普及，为其他硬件厂商与AI生态的整合提供了可行范本。未来，随着AI助手理解上下文能力的持续增强，此类“语音/文字驱动硬件”的交互模式有望成为智能办公和创作环境的新标准。

history.title: Oracle believed to have cut 10,000 positions across multiple divisions as mass layoffs begin to fuel AI investments — company is reportedly reducing headcount to fund data centers
history.description: Oracle reportedly cut over 10,000 positions based on reports from various employees. The move comes after the company has spent billions of dollars on AI infrastructure, with some saying that it will be in the red until 2030 after all this spending.
history.content: Copy link Facebook X Whatsapp Reddit Pinterest Flipboard Email Share this article 6 Join the conversation Follow us Add us as a preferred source on Google Newsletter Tom's Hardware Stay On the Cutting Edge: Get the Tom's Hardware Newsletter Get Tom's Hardware's best news and in-depth reviews, straight to your inbox. Contact me with news and offers from other Future brands Receive email from us on behalf of our trusted partners or sponsors By submitting your information you agree to the Terms & Conditions and Privacy Policy and are aged 16 or over. You are now subscribed Your newsletter sign-up was successful An account already exists for this email address, please log in. Subscribe to our newsletter Oracle has reportedly begun mass layoffs based on reports by various people who worked at the company. According to the BBC, one employee noted that around 10,000 positions have been affected based on the number of active staff accounts in the firm’s Slack messaging system so far. Other people from across the company have also made posts about the situation on social media, like LinkedIn.“Today, Oracle conducted a significant reduction in force that impacted some of the most talented, dedicated, and high-performing people I’ve had the privilege of working alongside,” Michael Shepherd, a Senior Operations Manager at Oracle, said on LinkedIn. “Let me be direct: this was not a performance action. The individuals affected were not let go because of anything they did or didn’t do. Many of them are the people you call when something is truly broken, the ones who show up early, stay late, and carry institutional knowledge that took years to build.”The company has not released a comment about its global reduction in force at the time of writing, but there have been reports that it would axe thousands of positions and freeze hiring earlier in March. Rumors say that the cloud infrastructure firm is culling its numbers after investing billions of dollars on hardware and betting big on AI. However, this much spending means that the company is expected to be in the red until 2030.Article continues below You may like Oracle reportedly set to axe thousands of jobs and freeze hiring as AI data center bets ignite financial perfect storm Despite AI chip boom and record high stock price, ASML to lay off employees Claimed 1,100% increase in AI-driven layoffs in 2025 might be misleading It’s rumored that many of the affected employees will be replaced by AI, a disturbing trend after Microsoft’s AI boss said that AI can replace every white-collar job in 18 months. Oracle isn’t the only one that’s been cutting employee numbers in recent months, with Dutch chip equipment maker ASML laying off 1,700 management workers and EA reducing headcount in Battlefield-related studios. Meta has not laid off employees yet, but there have been rumors that the company is reducing employee bonuses for the second time in a row as it spends billions on AI hardware and talent.This isn’t the only problem that Oracle is currently facing. Earlier this year, some of its bondholders sued the company for misleading statements after it borrowed $38 billion two months after releasing $18 billion of notes and bonds in September 2025. There have also been reports of disagreements between OpenAI, Oracle, and SoftBank regarding who should have the ultimate control of the Stargate project, with the planned 600MW expansion at the Abilene, Texas, campus getting scrapped.These AI-driven layoffs are sounding disturbing for the average worker, especially as many industry experts and company leaders have been warning about the disruption that AI will bring to the job market. However, OpenAI boss Sam Altman said that companies are just using 'AI washing' as an excuse for these job cuts that they would have otherwise done anyway. But whether this is true or not, it gives little comfort to the affected Oracle employees, especially during these uncertain times. history.author: Jowi Morales
history.titleZh: 甲骨文启动大规模裁员以注资AI，据称多个部门削减万名岗位——报道称公司正通过缩减人力来筹集数据中心建设资金。
history.descriptionZh:
据多方报道和公司内部人士消息，数据库与云服务巨头甲骨文（Oracle）已开始进行大规模裁员。英国广播公司（BBC）援引员工信息称，根据公司内部通信工具Slack上活跃员工账户数量的变化估算，此次裁员可能影响约10,000个职位。甲骨文公司高级运营经理迈克尔·谢泼德等多名员工在领英等社交平台上证实了裁员行动，并强调被裁员工多为高绩效、经验丰富的骨干人员，此次裁员并非基于个人绩效。

此次裁员行动并非毫无预兆。早在今年三月，已有报道称甲骨文计划削减数千个职位并冻结招聘。分析普遍认为，这一举措与公司向人工智能和云基础设施领域的激进转型战略密切相关。甲骨文近年来在AI硬件和数据中心领域投入了数十亿美元，但巨额投资也导致公司预计将面临持续亏损直至2030年。有传言指出，许多被削减的岗位将由人工智能技术接替，这呼应了此前微软AI负责人关于AI可能在18个月内取代所有白领工作的言论，引发了业界对AI引发就业市场颠覆的担忧。

值得关注的是，甲骨文并非近期唯一进行裁员的科技公司。荷兰芯片设备制造商ASML此前裁减了1,700名管理人员，电子艺界（EA）也削减了与《战地》系列相关工作室的人员。尽管Meta尚未启动裁员，但已连续两次削减员工奖金，同样是为了将更多资源投入AI硬件和人才争夺。

除了裁员风波，甲骨文还面临其他挑战。今年早些时候，部分债券持有人起诉公司，指控其在2025年9月发行180亿美元票据仅两个月后，又借款380亿美元，存在误导性陈述。此外，有报道称，甲骨文与OpenAI、软银在耗资巨大的“星门”（Stargate）AI数据中心项目控制权上存在分歧，导致原计划在德克萨斯州阿比林校区进行的600兆瓦扩容项目已被取消。

针对AI驱动裁员的趋势，OpenAI首席执行官萨姆·奥尔特曼提出了不同看法，认为许多公司只是以“AI洗白”为借口，进行本就计划进行的人员优化。然而，无论原因为何，对于正处在行业变革浪潮中的甲骨文员工而言，这一系列变动无疑带来了巨大的不确定性。

With excruciating price rises from the insane AI push for datacenter rollouts, and now the Middle East conflict is having a knock-on effect to push tech component prices higher still. There's no end in sight for the continuation of astronomical price inflation. Still, we will do our best to hunt down deals and money-saving opportunities on computers and tech hardware, to help keep our PC enthusiast community thriving.Spotted at Newegg are the perfect starting components for a crisp all-white PC build, and most importantly, an opportunity to pick up a large 64GB of Corsair Vengeance RAM and a top-spec 2TB Samsung 9100 Pro SSD for just $611, which is incredibly cheap considering current prices, where just 64GB of RAM can set you back $800 for the cheapest RAM kit with similar speeds and specs. To grab this offer, head to Newegg, where you can pick up 64GB of Corsair Vengeance DDR5-6400 RAM, a 2TB Samsung 9100 Pro SSD, a Gigabyte Auros Elite X870 motherboard, and a Corsair Frame 5000D RS PC case , all for just $1039.99. ● Grab this deal at Newegg The components featured in this combo are the perfect start to putting together an all-white PC build. Starting with Corsair's high-airflow Frame 5000D RS PC case, which has perforated mesh panels to let the cool air in to keep your components running at the correct operating temperatures. A highly adjustable InfiniRail mounting system lets you install an array of fan and radiator sizes for the perfect setup.Gigabyte's X870 Auros Elite motherboard is icy white and features 16+2+2 power stages, an EZ-latch tool-less design for switching in and out M.2 SSDs and PCI components, and lots of heat-spreaders for the VRMs and M.2 drives. Plus, the WiFi 7 and 2.5GbE have you covered for fast connectivity for gaming or networking.Samsung's 2TB 9100 Pro SSD is one of the fastest PCIe 5.0 SSDs on the market, with blistering read/write speeds of 14,700/13,400 MB/s, respectively, and random read/writes of 1,850K/2,600K, with a 1,200 TBW endurance rating. 2TB of capacity is a very good start for a gaming PC, with plenty of space for the operating system and a good selection of games.The costliest component right now is, of course, the RAM. This bundle includes a whopping 64GB of potent DDR5-6400 RAM. The Corsair Vengeance 64GB kit has a CAS latency of CL32 and timings of 40-40-84. More than enough for a few open browser tabs. history.titleZh: 搭配技嘉X870 AORUS ELITE主板与海盗船5000D机箱，仅需611美元即可获得64GB海盗船复仇者内存+三星2TB PCIe 5.0 9100 Pro固态硬盘——纯白配色装机方案
history.descriptionZh:
近期PC组装者和硬件爱好者面临持续的市场压力。受数据中心AI部署狂潮导致的零部件价格飙升，以及中东冲突对供应链的连带影响，科技组件价格居高不下，天文数字般的通胀似乎未见尽头。尽管如此，业界仍在努力寻找计算机和科技硬件的优惠与省钱方案，以维持PC爱好者社区的活力。

Newegg平台近期出现了一套堪称完美的全白色PC组建起步套装，其核心亮点在于能以极低成本获取大容量高性能组件：仅需611美元即可购得64GB的 Corsair Vengeance内存和顶级规格的2TB三星9100 Pro固态硬盘。在当前市场环境下，仅一款速度与规格相近的64GB内存套件起价就可达800美元，使得此次捆绑优惠显得格外超值。若扩展至完整套装，用户只需支付1039.99美元，即可一并获得以下四件白色主题组件：64GB Corsair Vengeance DDR5-6400内存、2TB三星9100 Pro SSD、技嘉X870 Aorus Elite主板以及Corsair Frame 5000D RS机箱。

**套装组件技术细节与性能分析：**

1.  **Corsair Frame 5000D RS机箱**：采用高气流设计，配备穿孔网状面板以优化冷空气进入，确保组件维持在适宜工作温度。其高度可调的InfiniRail安装系统支持多种尺寸的风扇和散热器配置，为定制化散热方案提供灵活性。

2.  **技嘉X870 Aorus Elite主板**：冰白色外观，搭载16+2+2相供电设计。其创新性的EZ-latch免工具卡扣设计，使得安装或更换M.2 SSD及PCIe组件更为便捷。主板为VRM供电区和M.2硬盘配备了大量散热装甲，并集成Wi-Fi 7和2.5GbE网卡，为游戏或网络应用提供高速连接。

3.  **三星2TB 9100 Pro SSD**：作为市场上速度领先的PCIe 5.0固态硬盘之一，其顺序读取/写入速度分别高达14,700 MB/s和13,400 MB/s，随机读取/写入性能达1,850K/2,600K IOPS，耐用性评级为1200 TBW（总写入字节数）。2TB容量为游戏PC提供了充裕的系统与游戏存储空间。

4.  **Corsair Vengeance 64GB DDR5-6400内存套件**：包含两条32GB模块，运行频率为6400MHz，时序为CL32-40-40-84。在当前内存价格高企的背景下——甚至可能超过高端显卡——此套装内含的64GB大容量高性能内存成为了显著的成本节约点。

**价格对比与市场影响**：
该捆绑套餐原价为1949.96美元，现价1039.99美元，折扣幅度高达47%（节省909.97美元）。此优惠在组件普遍昂贵的市场环境中具有重要意义。虽然部分组件价格可能低于两年前水平，但当前的市场条件已截然不同。此类组合包是抵消整体装机成本上涨的有效方式之一。若其规格符合用户需求，则代表了当下一个难得的入手时机。

**总结与应用场景**：
此套装为打造一套整洁、高性能的全白色主题PC提供了理想的起步基础，尤其适合追求外观一致性及高性能的游戏玩家和内容创作者。在整体市场价格高企的背景下，通过信誉良好的零售商选择经过搭配的捆绑包，是获取关键组件、控制预算的务实策略。对于寻求进一步节省开支的用户，可持续关注各类专项硬件优惠页面，包括SSD/存储、硬盘、游戏显示器、显卡、CPU及主板等领域的促销信息。

history.description: Redditor bought a sealed retail box featuring 'Nvidia Vision 2' 3D glasses for just $2.99.
history.content: Copy link Facebook X Whatsapp Reddit Pinterest Flipboard Email Share this article 9 Join the conversation Follow us Add us as a preferred source on Google Newsletter Tom's Hardware Stay On the Cutting Edge: Get the Tom's Hardware Newsletter Get Tom's Hardware's best news and in-depth reviews, straight to your inbox. You are now subscribed Your newsletter sign-up was successful An account already exists for this email address, please log in. Subscribe to our newsletter Do you remember Nvidia’s 3D Vision 2 glasses, which launched about a decade and a half ago? It isn’t clear whether retro gaming Redditor sinrivers does, exclaiming, “I can’t believe this find” after unearthing a pair buried in a thrift store’s home décor bric-a-brac section. They bought this sealed Nvidia retail box featuring the 3D glasses for just $2.99. That’s a great saving on the launch price of $149 or $99, depending on whether they included the IR transmitter. But what use are these artifacts in 2026?I can't believe this find from r/nvidiaIf we wind back the clock to the early 2010s, there was some momentum behind 3D gaming with the added magic of 3D monitors combined with active-shutter 3D glasses. This was the peak 3D monitor era, with several big-name monitor vendors supplying compatible 3D monitors and graphics cards with the requisite port selection. Big PC brands like Asus could provide a whole ecosystem at the time: monitor, glasses, and graphics card.Nvidia’s solution was 3D Vision (AMD offered HD3D), and to enjoy the experience as intended, you would want a compatible GPU plus a LightBoost-certified monitor, providing both a 3D HDMI 1.4 input and a dual-link DVI input. On the human side, you’d wear active-shutter glasses like these Nvidia 3D Vision 2 spectacles, and an IR emitter was also necessary – but sometimes built into the 3D monitor you bought.Article continues below You may like Enthusiast scores watercooled dual Nvidia GTX Titan X GPUs for $86 Shopper walks out with a $4.99 Radeon RX 5700 XT GPU from Goodwill Tinkerer builds DIY VR headset with CRT screens repurposed from Sony Watchman The experience was loved by some, but others considered it overrated. For a snapshot of the ecosystem and its capabilities at the time, check out the Tom’s Hardware archives. For example, in September 2011, we published a 22-page, 18-game comparison featuring the best solutions for Nvidia 3D Vision vs AMD HD3D glasses users.Image 1 of 3(Image credit: Future)(Image credit: Future)(Image credit: Future)Whatever your opinion, it is undeniable that the 3D glasses and 3D monitor-driven experience faded rather quickly. So, what can sinrivers do with their $2.99 bargain today?As the simplest option, they could leave the package untouched as a shrink-wrapped pristine tech artifact. It would also probably be possible to make a quick profit through sites like eBay. Alternatively, if enough complementary ecosystem components are within sinrivers’ grasp, there are classic 3D gaming experiences of the era to enjoy, some 3D movies of the era to soak up, and even some emulators covering consoles of the era that support this system. Please note that Nvidia removed 3D Vision support from its GeForce drivers in 2019. history.author: Mark Tyson
history.titleZh: PC爱好者2.99美元淘到NVIDIA 3D Vision 2古董眼镜——这款2011年问世时售价149美元的PC游戏文物，曾是英伟达眼中游戏未来的"昔日愿景"
history.descriptionZh:
近日，一位名为 sinrivers 的复古游戏爱好者在 Reddit 上分享了一次令人惊叹的发现：他在一家二手商店的家居装饰杂货区，以仅 2.99 美元的价格购得了一套全新未拆封的 Nvidia 3D Vision 2 眼镜。这与其最初发布时 149 美元（含红外发射器）或 99 美元的售价相比，堪称“考古”级别的捡漏。这一发现将人们的记忆带回了约十五年前，即 2010 年代初期，那曾是 3D 游戏与 3D 显示器短暂而辉煌的巅峰时代。

当时，为了获得理想的 3D 游戏体验，用户需要一套完整的生态系统支持。核心是兼容的显卡（Nvidia 的解决方案是 3D Vision，AMD 则提供 HD3D）和经过 LightBoost 认证的 3D 显示器。这类显示器必须同时提供 3D HDMI 1.4 输入和双链路 DVI 输入。用户需要佩戴如 Nvidia 3D Vision 2 这样的主动快门式 3D 眼镜，其镜片能够与显示器的刷新率同步快速开合，分别为左右眼提供交替图像，从而在大脑中形成立体视觉。一个红外发射器（有时会集成在显示器中）负责向眼镜发送同步信号。像华硕这样的大厂当时甚至能提供包括显示器、眼镜和显卡在内的完整套装。

就性能和体验而言，这项技术在当时引起了两极分化的评价。一些玩家热爱其带来的沉浸感，而另一些人则认为它被高估了。Tom‘s Hardware 在 2011 年 9 月曾发布过一份长达 22 页、涵盖 18 款游戏的深度对比评测，详细分析了 Nvidia 3D Vision 与 AMD HD3D 解决方案的优劣。尽管在特定硬件和游戏上能实现令人印象深刻的效果，但整体而言，3D 游戏生态未能持续发展。其衰落可归因于多种因素：体验质量因内容和用户生理差异而不同，需要高昂的专用硬件投入，以及佩戴眼镜的不便和可能的视觉疲劳。最终，这项技术迅速被市场边缘化，Nvidia 也在 2019 年从其 GeForce 驱动程序中移除了对 3D Vision 的支持。

那么，在 2026 年的今天，这盒全新的“科技古董”有何用武之地？其应用场景已从主流实用转向了怀旧与收藏。首先，最直接的选择是将其保持原封包装状态，作为一件记录 PC 硬件发展史上特定篇章的完美藏品。其次，通过 eBay 等平台转手，很可能快速获利，因为对于收藏家或复古硬件爱好者而言，全新未拆封的产品具有特殊价值。最后，如果持有者能设法凑齐一整套当年的生态系统组件——包括兼容的显卡、3D 显示器和红外发射器——理论上仍可重温那个时代的经典 3D 游戏、观看当时的 3D 电影，甚至通过支持该系统的模拟器体验旧主机游戏的 3D 效果。当然，这需要克服驱动兼容性等挑战，更多是出于情怀与技术考古的乐趣。

总而言之，这则新闻不仅讲述了一次有趣的二手市场发现，更折射出一段曾经被寄予厚望、却最终昙花一现的消费电子技术史。Nvidia 3D Vision 2 眼镜从一个侧面见证了 3D 显示技术在游戏领域探索的兴衰。

history.author: Technical Paper Link
history.titleZh: AMS设计中的因果推断（佛罗里达大学）
history.descriptionZh:
近日，佛罗里达大学发表了一篇题为《面向AMS电路设计的因果AI：可解释参数效应分析》的技术论文。该研究聚焦于解决模拟混合信号电路设计中长期存在的瓶颈问题。

模拟混合信号电路因其高度非线性和对连续现实世界信号的处理特性，使得传统基于数据驱动的人工智能模型难以对其进行精确建模，这与相对规则的数字电路设计形成鲜明对比。目前，AMS设计严重依赖设计师的经验和耗时费力的迭代仿真，导致设计周期长、成本高昂。论文的核心在于引入因果推断理论，旨在弥合高度结构化的电路设计知识与纯数据驱动的AI黑箱模型之间的鸿沟。

研究团队提出的创新方法并非简单地将AI用作性能预测器，而是构建了一个**结构因果模型**，以揭示电路设计参数（如晶体管尺寸、偏置电压）与电路性能指标（如增益、带宽、功耗）之间内在的**因果关系**，而非仅仅统计相关性。这使得AI模型具备了可解释性：设计师不仅能知道调整某个参数会导致性能如何变化，还能理解其背后的物理或电路原理。关键技术工具包括**反事实分析**，即回答“如果当初我选择了不同的参数值，结果会怎样？”这类在设计迭代中至关重要的问题。

在性能验证方面，该方法相较于传统的黑盒机器学习模型（如神经网络）展现出显著优势。它能够在**小样本数据**下有效工作，这对于仿真成本极高的AMS设计至关重要。同时，模型输出的因果图直接指明了关键设计参数及其影响路径，大幅提升了设计洞察的效率。论文通过基准电路（如运算放大器、锁相环）的案例研究进行了验证，展示了如何利用因果模型快速定位性能瓶颈并指导优化方向，减少了不必要的仿真次数。

这项技术的潜在影响深远。它将推动AMS设计从“经验驱动+试错”模式向“知识驱动+AI辅助推理”模式演进。具体应用场景包括：加速高性能计算、汽车电子、医疗设备中的定制化AMS模块设计；为新手设计师提供强大的决策支持工具，缩短学习曲线；以及在工艺节点迁移时，快速复用和调整既有设计知识。总体而言，将因果AI引入AMS设计，标志着该领域向更智能、更可解释、更高效的设计自动化迈出了关键一步。
